title: salacia subicterica
intro: Salacia subicterica, also known as Bitter Chai or Winter Cherry, is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salacia subicterica include its ability to help manage blood sugar levels, improve lipid profiles, and support weight loss, among others. Salacia subicterica is typically prepared as a decoction or an infusion by boiling its roots or leaves in water, and it can also be consumed as a herbal supplement or added to teas and other beverages.
